creator: pvoigt@uos.de
text:
During usage of print/cups PageLog remains empty. ErrorLog and AccessLog are filled as expected.

Otherwise printing works correctly.

Issue is discussed on the list:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2015-August/100186.html

I have tested on 10.2-RELEASE-p1 (amd64).
